title: erysimum capitatum var. perenne
intro: Erysimum capitatum var. perenne, also known as Western Wallflower, is a perennial plant in the family Brassicaceae, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and hairy leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. It is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system. Erysimum capitatum var. perenne can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be used to promote overall well-being and support the body's natural healing processes.
